name: Collard Greens with Meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from greens.
2. Wash greens in cold water.
3. Repeat rinsing three times.
4. Place greens in pot of boiling ham, beef, or pork (preferably smoked) when meat is about halfway cooked.
5. Finish cooking greens for 50-60 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
